# Lattica

> Clean-room, MIT-licensed data grid & spreadsheet engine for React/Next.js:
> canvas rendering, a self-built Excel-compatible formula engine (150 functions,
> dynamic-array spill, LAMBDA, structured references), CRDT collaboration,
> AI-native helpers, and an MCP tool layer. Eight packages, headless-first.

For AI coding agents, the primary guide is AGENTS.md — task-oriented, copy-paste
recipes and conventions. Start there.

## Docs
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how agents should use Lattica (APIs, recipes, gotchas).
- [docs/USAGE.md](docs/USAGE.md): human usage guide.
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): design and rendering model.
- [docs/COMPETITIVE_GAP_ANALYSIS.md](docs/COMPETITIVE_GAP_ANALYSIS.md): feature coverage vs Handsontable/AG Grid/Univer.
- [docs/PROGRESS.md](docs/PROGRESS.md): full feature changelog.

## Packages (import from the package name)
- @lattica/core: headless models (sizes, selection, undo, merge, validation, conditional format, number format, aggregate, pivot, sparkline, chart layout, detail, fill, coords).
- @lattica/formula: SheetEngine, parser, 150 functions, dependency graph, spill, named ranges, R1C1, structured refs.
- @lattica/data: visual↔physical index mapping, sort/filter, nested rows, DataView, AsyncRowModel.
- @lattica/react: <LatticaGrid>, <LatticaStatusBar>, <LatticaChart>, useGridController, themes (palette × density).
- @lattica/io: CSV/TSV, XLSX read + plain/styled write, JSON, clipboard, tableToPdf.
- @lattica/collab: CRDT (LWW), fractional index keys, presence.
- @lattica/ai: provider-agnostic NL→formula/operation, smart fill, anomaly (MockProvider for tests).
- @lattica/mcp: grid tool registry + ToolDispatcher.

## Live demo
https://lattica-demo.vercel.app — one interactive page per feature.
